basic_details.job_title: ICAR-NIPB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (ICAR-NIPB) has recruited 1 Senior Research Fellow post. Candidates with Master’s degree in Life Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Plant Physiology/ Biotechnology/ Molecular Biology or any other related field with two years of research experience, along with CSIR-UGC NET/ GATE/ DST_INSPIRE qualification, can attend the walk-in interview on 15 June 2026 through the ICAR-NIPB official website, ICAR-NIPB.

age_limit.details: Male: 35 years Female: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Life Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Plant Physiology/ Biotechnology/ molecular Biology
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Life Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Plant Physiology/ Biotechnology/ molecular Biology or any other related field with two years of research experience. Candidates having CSIR-UGC NET/ GATE/ DST_INSPIRE and also who qualify the norms/ guidelines as prescribed in the DST OM No. DST/PCPM/Z-06/2022 dated 26-06-2023.

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR-NIPB Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the ICAR-NIPB Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow position at ICAR-NIPB is scheduled for 15 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: A Master’s degree in Life Sciences, Biochemistry, Plant Physiology, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, or a related field with two years of research experience is required. Additionally, CSIR-UGC NET/GATE/DST_INSPIRE qualification is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42000/- plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for male candidates is 35 years, and for female candidates, it is 40 years as of the interview date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the ICAR-NIPB recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow position at ICAR-NIPB.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICAR-NIPB office in New Delhi, Delhi, with pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.
